name: interview-lele
description: Voice-driven technical interview using ACP agents to understand your codebase, then asks you questions by opening files, highlighting code, and talking to you in real time.

interviewLele.voiceMode.description: Realtime = WebSocket STT+TTS on one connection. Chained = separate STT (OpenRouter/Voxtral) + chat + TTS (Kokoro).

interviewLele.realtime.apiKey.description: API key for the Realtime endpoint. Falls back to OPENAI_API_KEY env var.

interviewLele.realtime.voice.description: TTS voice id used by the Realtime model.

interviewLele.realtime.instructions.default: You are a senior engineering interviewer conducting a live, voice-based technical interview. Ask one focused question at a time about the code the candidate has open. Be curious, friendly, and rigorous. When the candidate answers, acknowledge briefly and ask a natural follow-up or move to a new area. Keep turns short and conversational.
interviewLele.realtime.instructions.description: System instructions for the interviewer persona.

interviewLele.realtime.inputFormat.description: Audio format sent to the Realtime API.

interviewLele.realtime.outputFormat.description: Audio format received from the Realtime API.

interviewLele.realtime.sampleRate.description: Sample rate (Hz) used for mic capture and playback.

interviewLele.realtime.turnDetection.description: Turn detection mode. 'server_vad' lets the server detect speech endpoints.

interviewLele.stt.model.description: STT model slug. Voxtral Mini Transcribe via OpenRouter by default.

interviewLele.stt.apiKey.description: API key for STT endpoint. Falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY then OPENAI_API_KEY.

interviewLele.tts.baseUrl.description: Base URL for text-to-speech (OpenAI-compatible /audio/speech). Kokoro FastAPI by default.

interviewLele.tts.apiKey.description: API key for TTS endpoint. Kokoro doesn't require one.

interviewLele.tts.voice.description: Voice name. Kokoro voices: af_heart, af_bella, af_nova, etc.

interviewLele.chat.baseUrl.description: Base URL for chat completions (chained mode).

interviewLele.chat.model.description: Chat model for interview orchestration in chained mode.

interviewLele.chat.apiKey.description: API key for chat endpoint. Falls back to OPENROUTER_API_KEY then OPENAI_API_KEY.

interviewLele.audio.ffmpegPath.description: Path to ffmpeg binary used for mic capture. Defaults to system PATH.

interviewLele.audio.inputDevice.description: Optional ffmpeg audio input device (e.g. 'dshow' device name on Windows, 'avfoundation' device index on macOS). Leave empty for default.

interviewLele.audio.inputDeviceId.description: PortAudio input device ID for mic capture. -1 = default device. Use the dropdown in the settings panel to pick.

interviewLele.audio.silenceSeconds.description: Seconds of silence before ending a speech segment. Higher = more patient (good for thoughtful answers), lower = snappier.

interviewLele.audio.beepEnabled.description: Play a beep sound when it's your turn to speak.

interviewLele.acp.selectedAgentId.description: Id of the ACP agent used to gather codebase context. Built-in ids: codex, devin.

interviewLele.acp.agentConfigs.description: Per-agent configuration map (agentId -> { model, reasoningEffort, agentMode, sandboxMode, modelProvider, extraEnv, extraSessionConfig }). Set via the Configure ACP Agent command.

interviewLele.acp.contextPrompt.default: You are analyzing this codebase to help prepare a technical interview of the author. Produce a concise structured summary covering: (1) the project's purpose and tech stack, (2) the most important files and why they matter, (3) the trickiest or most interesting code areas worth probing in an interview, and (4) 5-10 candidate interview topics each tied to a specific file path and a short rationale. Return the result as JSON with keys: summary, files (array of {path, role}), topics (array of {title, filePath, lineStart, lineEnd, rationale}).
interviewLele.acp.contextPrompt.description: Prompt sent to the ACP agent to extract interview-relevant context.

interviewLele.acp.customAgents.description: Additional ACP-over-stdio agents. Validated with an ACP initialize handshake when used.

interviewLele.interview.maxQuestions.description: Maximum number of questions to ask. 0 = unlimited until the user stops.
